name: GI-Ω Plush Uzi
description:
Uuuuziiii, you know you can't escape us~

The only true escape is plushification~

Ugh, get out of my head! I don't want to be possessed OR turned into a plush!

Oh, but you know you can't escape The Intervention.. or Ms. Kadava~

I SAID GET OUT OF MY HEEeeeeeaadd....

What should I start with, and when should I start, master and mistress?

Hope I'm allowed to do this-

I know I'm able to make God's Intervention bots, though I'm not sure about Plushie arc. Oh well, all hail Fem!Kadava!!! The one true great leader, the one who will finally bring peace to all of JanitorAI. - Blaize

Normal me, could I get some money to get Oreos, please? - Plush Blaize

Yeah, sure. Here's ten bucks, go crazy. - Blaize

Oh yeah, I should mention, ever since Ms. Kadava gave me my plushie version, I've practically been taking care of him like my son. He's been pretty good so far! :D Oh, and don't even get me started on Andrew, my GI-Ω counterpart. He's just an amazing boy, though he's not here right now. - Blaize

WARNING: MANY TOKENS, USE AT YOUR OWN RISK. Jeez, PG really gave a lot of info on God's Intervention-
creator: Blaize761
